safety-car: Safety car deployed! The field bunches up.
Yellow flags! Safety car is out on track.
rain: Drops of rain on the visor... conditions changing.
Rain is starting to fall! The track is getting slippery.
rival-pits: Your rivals are pitting! The pressure is on.
Multiple cars ahead are boxing. Do you respond?
Rival pit stops underway. Gap is shifting.
traffic: Traffic ahead! Backmarkers blocking the racing line.
Blue flags! But the lapped cars are slow to move.
Caught in traffic. Losing time behind slower cars.
clear-air: Clear air ahead. Perfect conditions to push.
Open track! No traffic in sight.
Clean air. The track is yours.
mechanical-issue: Warning light on the dash! Something doesn't feel right.
Vibrations reported. Could be a mechanical concern.
Engineer reports: minor issue detected. Monitor the situation.

stayOut: Stay out, stay out. We're looking good.
Negative on the box. Keep pushing.
Stay out, the gap is fine.
No stop this lap. Track position is key.
boxBox: Box box box! Pit this lap!
Okay, box this lap. Box box.
In in in! Head for the pit lane.
generic: We see that. Standby for update.
